== Notes for [[Item:Q90042|Q90042]] ==

ID: I84733

Name: Arria Sextia Paulina

Given Name: Arria Sextia

Surname: Paulina

Sex: F

_UID: 2BC2556F2D16AF4C9C9C2633E218AE5B8375

Change Date: 3 Oct 2005

Birth: ABT 130

Death: deceased

Marriage 1 Servius Cornelius Scipio Salvidienus b: ABT 123

Married:

Children

Cornelia Negrina b: ABT 150

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I84733

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
